resetPassword.subtitle: Pick a strong password for your BimStitch account. The reset link expires after first use.

errors.tokenMissing: Reset link is missing the token. Use the link from the email or request a new one.

settings.pageSubtitle: Manage appearance now and keep a dedicated place for personal preferences as the portal grows.
settings.appearanceDescription: The sidebar no longer owns theme switching. Appearance is managed here so more preferences can be added without crowding navigation.
settings.plannedAppearanceDescription: Accent choices, compact density, motion preferences, and viewer-specific display defaults can be added here without changing the sidebar again.
settings.accountDescription: Personal account controls will be grouped here instead of spreading them across the sidebar and modal flows.
settings.roadmapDescription: This section reserves a stable place for the settings users will expect next.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the portal language for interface labels, guidance, and future workflow copy.
settings.languageHelper: English and Dutch are stored separately in source so copy can be reviewed and refined later.

themeOptions.lightDescription: Bright workspace with higher contrast for daytime use.
themeOptions.darkDescription: Reduced glare for focused review sessions and low-light work.
themeOptions.systemDescription: Follow your operating system appearance automatically.

placeholders.profileDetailsDescription: Name, role, and contact preferences will be managed here.

placeholders.viewerDefaultsDescription: Default camera behavior, overlays, and inspection preferences will live here.
placeholders.notificationsDescription: Email and in-app alerts for project activity are reserved for a later milestone.
placeholders.workspaceBehaviorDescription: Search, dashboard density, and startup preferences will be grouped here.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: BIMstitch processes personal data from kwaliteitsborgers, contractors and project teams using the BIMstitch portal. This policy describes which data we collect, for what purpose, and which rights you have under the GDPR.
privacy.dataCollectedBody: Account and contact data (name, email, organisation), project content you upload (IFC models, photos, documents), inspection findings and their metadata, and technical log data used to secure and improve the service.
privacy.purposeBody: To run the Wkb workflows you perform with us: managing assurance plans, inspections, findings and dossier preparation for the competent authority. We do not sell your data and do not use it for profiling or automated decision-making.
privacy.retentionBody: Data that is part of a Wkb dossier is retained for 10 years after delivery in line with statutory retention obligations. Account and billing data is kept as long as necessary to perform the contract and any applicable tax retention period.
privacy.rightsBody: You have the right to access, correction, restriction of processing, data portability and (within the limits of statutory retention) deletion. Requests can be sent to privacy@bimstitch.example. Complaints can also be filed with the Dutch Data Protection Authority.
privacy.hostingBody: All personal data is hosted within the EU. A current list of sub-processors (such as our email, payment and storage providers) is included in the Data Processing Agreement (DPA).

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.intro: These terms apply to use of the BIMstitch portal by business users. By creating an account or using the portal, you agree to these terms.
terms.serviceBody: BIMstitch is a software platform for quality assurance under the Dutch Wet kwaliteitsborging voor het bouwen (Wkb). The portal supports risk assessments, assurance plans, inspections, findings and dossier preparation.
terms.obligationsBody: You provide accurate account information, do not share login credentials with third parties, and use the portal in compliance with applicable laws and regulations. Responsibility for the underlying work – such as filing notifications with the competent authority – remains with you.
terms.billingBody: Subscriptions run monthly or annually and renew automatically unless cancelled before the renewal date. Payment is made via the methods offered in the portal. In case of non-payment we may restrict access to the account.
terms.liabilityBody: Our liability is limited to direct damages up to the amount paid by you for the subscription in the preceding twelve months. Liability for indirect damages, consequential loss or missed savings is excluded, except in case of intent or wilful recklessness.
terms.terminationBody: You can cancel the subscription from the portal settings. Upon termination, Wkb dossiers remain available for as long as legally required; afterwards they are securely deleted.

dpa.title: Data processing agreement (DPA)
dpa.intro: This draft DPA describes how BIMstitch (processor) processes personal data on behalf of the customer (controller) when using the BIMstitch portal. A signable PDF version is available on request.
dpa.scopeBody: The processing concerns personal data of project participants and end users, for the duration of the main agreement and any statutory retention periods that apply afterwards.
dpa.categoriesTitle: Categories of data subjects and data
dpa.categoriesBody: Data subjects: employees of the controller, kwaliteitsborgers, contractors and other project participants. Data: contact and account details, project content, inspection evidence (photos, location data) and usage logs.
dpa.subprocessorsBody: We use carefully selected sub-processors within the EU for hosting, email, payment processing and error monitoring. A current list is available on request; we notify the controller in advance of any changes.
dpa.securityBody: We apply appropriate technical and organisational measures, including encryption in transit and at rest, least-privilege access control, audit logging and periodic backups to a separate EU region.
dpa.incidentBody: If we suspect a data breach we notify the controller within 24 hours of discovery, with the information known so far and an initial assessment of impact and mitigation.
dpa.rightsBody: We support the controller in responding to requests from data subjects (access, correction, deletion, data portability) within statutory deadlines.
dpa.returnBody: Upon termination of the main agreement, personal data is returned or securely deleted on request, subject to statutory retention obligations such as the 10-year Wkb dossier retention.

pwaInstall.promptBody: Add to your home screen for full-screen inspections, offline access and faster launches.
pwaInstall.iosHint: On iOS, tap the share icon and choose “Add to Home Screen”.

organizations.pageSubtitle: Provision new tenants, allocate seats, and manage their lifecycle.

create.title: Create tenant
create.subtitle: Provisions a new tenant with its own Postgres schema and sends the first admin an activation email.

hints.seatLimit: Leave empty for unlimited seats. The first admin counts as one seat.

existingUser.checking: Checking if this email is already in use…
existingUser.banner: {name} already has an account. They'll be added as admin of this tenant — no new account is created.

errors.nameTaken: A tenant with this name already exists.
errors.seatLimitInvalid: Seat limit must be a positive integer.

edit.title: Edit tenant
edit.subtitle: Rename the tenant, change its status, or adjust the seat cap.

hints.seatLimit: Current usage: {used}. Leave empty for unlimited seats.

errors.seatLimitInvalid: Seat limit must be a positive integer.
errors.seatLimitBelowUsage: Seat limit cannot be lower than the current usage of {used}.

detail.confirmDelete: Delete tenant "{name}"? Its data and schema will be dropped. This cannot be undone.

suspend.title: Suspend tenant?
suspend.body: Suspending "{name}" blocks all of its members from logging into the workspace and acting on tenant data. Super-admins keep full access. You can reactivate any time.

reactivate.title: Reactivate tenant?
reactivate.body: Reactivating "{name}" restores access for its members.

invite.title: Invite member
invite.subtitle: Sends an activation email if the user does not yet have an account.

fields.isOrgAdmin: Make this user a tenant admin

errors.seatLimitExceeded: The tenant has no available seats. Raise the seat limit before inviting more members.
errors.alreadyMember: This user is already a member of the tenant.

tooltips.lastAdmin: The tenant must have at least one admin. Promote another member before changing this role.
tooltips.ownsProjects: This member owns one or more projects. Reassign ownership before removing them.

errors.lastAdminRequired: The tenant must have at least one admin.
errors.lastSuperuserRequired: At least one super admin must remain.
errors.invalidStatusTransition: That status change is not allowed.
errors.orgNotActive: Tenant is suspended; this action is unavailable.
errors.ownsActiveProjects: Pick a new owner for this member's projects before removing them.
errors.invitationExpired: This invitation has expired. Ask an admin to resend it.
errors.reassignTargetNotEligible: Pick a different teammate to take over.

reassign.title: Reassign owned projects
reassign.subtitle: This member owns {count, plural, one {1 project} other {# projects}} in the tenant. Pick another active member to take over before removing them.

leave.title: Leave this tenant
leave.subtitle: You will lose access to all projects in this tenant. The admin must invite you again to come back.

users.pageSubtitle: Search across all users in the platform, toggle access, and grant super-admin rights.
